# gormigrate

```go
import "github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/v2"
```

Package gormigrate is a minimalistic migration helper for Gorm \(http://gorm.io\)

## Variables

<a name="DefaultOptions"></a>

```go
var (
    // DefaultOptions can be used if you don't want to think about options.
    DefaultOptions = &Options{
        TableName:                 "migrations",
        IDColumnName:              "id",
        IDColumnSize:              255,
        UseTransaction:            false,
        ValidateUnknownMigrations: false,
    }

    // ErrRollbackImpossible is returned when trying to rollback a migration
    // that has no rollback function.
    ErrRollbackImpossible = errors.New("gormigrate: It's impossible to rollback this migration")

    // ErrNoMigrationDefined is returned when no migration is defined.
    ErrNoMigrationDefined = errors.New("gormigrate: No migration defined")

    // ErrMissingID is returned when the ID od migration is equal to ""
    ErrMissingID = errors.New("gormigrate: Missing ID in migration")

    // ErrNoRunMigration is returned when any run migration was found while
    // running RollbackLast
    ErrNoRunMigration = errors.New("gormigrate: Could not find last run migration")

    // ErrMigrationIDDoesNotExist is returned when migrating or rolling back to a migration ID that
    // does not exist in the list of migrations
    ErrMigrationIDDoesNotExist = errors.New("gormigrate: Tried to migrate to an ID that doesn't exist")

    // ErrUnknownPastMigration is returned if a migration exists in the DB that doesn't exist in the code
    ErrUnknownPastMigration = errors.New("gormigrate: Found migration in DB that does not exist in code")
)
```

<a name="DuplicatedIDError"></a>

## type [DuplicatedIDError](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L71-L73>)

DuplicatedIDError is returned when more than one migration have the same ID

```go
type DuplicatedIDError struct {
    ID string
}
```

<a name="Gormigrate"></a>

## type [Gormigrate](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L53-L59>)

Gormigrate represents a collection of all migrations of a database schema.

```go
type Gormigrate struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="New"></a>

### func [New](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L112>)

```go
func New(db *gorm.DB, options *Options, migrations []*Migration) *Gormigrate
```

New returns a new Gormigrate.

<a name="Gormigrate.InitSchema"></a>

### func \(\*Gormigrate\) [InitSchema](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L136>)

```go
func (g *Gormigrate) InitSchema(initSchema InitSchemaFunc)
```

InitSchema sets a function that is run if no migration is found. The idea is preventing to run all migrations when a new clean database is being migrating. In this function you should create all tables and foreign key necessary to your application.

<a name="Gormigrate.Migrate"></a>

### func \(\*Gormigrate\) [Migrate](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L141>)

```go
func (g *Gormigrate) Migrate() error
```

Migrate executes all migrations that did not run yet.

<a name="Gormigrate.MigrateTo"></a>

### func \(\*Gormigrate\) [MigrateTo](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L153>)

```go
func (g *Gormigrate) MigrateTo(migrationID string) error
```

MigrateTo executes all migrations that did not run yet up to the migration that matches \`migrationID\`.

<a name="Gormigrate.RollbackLast"></a>

### func \(\*Gormigrate\) [RollbackLast](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L252>)

```go
func (g *Gormigrate) RollbackLast() error
```

RollbackLast undo the last migration

<a name="Gormigrate.RollbackMigration"></a>

### func \(\*Gormigrate\) [RollbackMigration](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L320>)

```go
func (g *Gormigrate) RollbackMigration(m *Migration) error
```

RollbackMigration undo a migration.

<a name="Gormigrate.RollbackTo"></a>

### func \(\*Gormigrate\) [RollbackTo](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L273>)

```go
func (g *Gormigrate) RollbackTo(migrationID string) error
```

RollbackTo undoes migrations up to the given migration that matches the \`migrationID\`. Migration with the matching \`migrationID\` is not rolled back.

## type [InitSchemaFunc](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L24>)

```go
type InitSchemaFunc func(*gorm.DB) error
```

<a name="MigrateFunc"></a>

## type [MigrateFunc](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L18>)

MigrateFunc is the func signature for migrating.

```go
type MigrateFunc func(*gorm.DB) error
```

<a name="Migration"></a>

## type [Migration](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L43-L50>)

Migration represents a database migration \(a modification to be made on the database\).

```go
type Migration struct {
    // ID is the migration identifier. Usually a timestamp like "201601021504".
    ID  string
    // Migrate is a function that will br executed while running this migration.
    Migrate MigrateFunc
    // Rollback will be executed on rollback. Can be nil.
    Rollback RollbackFunc
}
```

<a name="Options"></a>

## type [Options](<https://github.com/go-gormigrate/gormigrate/blob/master/gormigrate.go#L27-L40>)

Options define options for all migrations.

```go
type Options struct {
    // TableName is the migration table.
    TableName string
    // IDColumnName is the name of column where the migration id will be stored.
    IDColumnName string
    // IDColumnSize is the length of the migration id column
    IDColumnSize int
    // UseTransaction makes Gormigrate execute migrations inside a single transaction.
    // Keep in mind that not all databases support DDL commands inside transactions.
    UseTransaction bool
    // ValidateUnknownMigrations will cause migrate to fail if there's unknown migration
    // IDs in the database
    ValidateUnknownMigrations bool
}
```
